sections.heading: League Overview
rules: Dynasty format — all players are kept year to year
12-team league, head-to-head scoring
PPR scoring (1 point per reception)
Regular season: Weeks 1–14, Playoffs: Weeks 15–17

sections.heading: Roster Settings
rules: Starters: 1 QB, 2 RB, 2 WR, 1 TE, 2 FLEX, 1 SUPERFLEX
Bench spots: 15
IR spots: 3
Taxi squad: 5 slots (rookies only in first year)

sections.heading: Draft Rules
rules: Rookie draft: 4 rounds, held after the NFL draft
Draft order: Reverse order of final standings (non-playoff teams via lottery)
Draft picks can be traded up to 2 years in advance

sections.heading: Trading
rules: Trades are processed immediately with no review period
No trade deadline during the regular season
Offseason trading opens the day after the championship
Draft picks and FAAB can be included in trades

sections.heading: Waivers & Free Agency
rules: FAAB (Free Agent Acquisition Budget): $100 per season
Waivers process Wednesday mornings
Continuous waivers after initial Wednesday processing
FAAB does not roll over between seasons

sections.heading: Playoffs
rules: 6 teams make the playoffs
Top 2 seeds receive a first-round bye
Seeding based on record, then total points for as tiebreaker
Consolation bracket determines draft order for non-playoff teams

sections.heading: Dues & Payouts
rules: Annual dues: $50 per team
1st place: $350
2nd place: $150
Regular season high scorer: $100
